rationale: Educ. Code §12.064 governs charter school probation and revocation procedures. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each board of trustees that grants a charter under this subchapter shall adopt a procedure to be used for placing on probation or revoking a charter it grants.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
